languages.text: Для многих эти святые воины служат образцами добродетели и долга, поскольку Кровавые Ангелы непоколебимо чтут заветы примарха Сангвиния, гласящие, что лишь прилежание и сострадание способны превратить Галактику в лучшее место, чем она есть сейчас. Каждый из них стремится быть защитником и утешителем простых людей, вдохновляя их личным примером.

For many, these holy warriors are paragons of virtue and duty, for the Blood Angels unfailingly uphold the precepts of Primarch Sanguinius, which state that only diligence and compassion can make the galaxy a better place than it is today. Each of them strives to be a protector and consoler of the common people, inspiring them through their own deeds.
languages.original_text: Для многих эти святые воины служат образцами добродетели и долга, поскольку Кровавые Ангелы непоколебимо чтут заветы примарха Сангвиния, гласящие, что лишь прилежание и сострадание способны превратить Галактику в лучшее место, чем она есть сейчас. Каждый из них стремится быть защитником и утешителем простых людей, вдохновляя их личным примером.

traits.locale_text: For many, these holy warriors are paragons of virtue and duty, for the Blood Angels unfailingly uphold the precepts of Primarch Sanguinius, which state that only diligence and compassion can make the galaxy a better place than it is today. Each of them strives to be a protector and consoler of the common people, inspiring them through their own deeds.

For many, these holy warriors are paragons of virtue and duty, for the Blood Angels unfailingly uphold the precepts of Primarch Sanguinius, which state that only diligence and compassion can make the galaxy a better place than it is today. Each of them strives to be a protector and consoler of the common people, inspiring them through their own deeds.

For many, these holy warriors are paragons of virtue and duty, for the Blood Angels unfailingly uphold the precepts of Primarch Sanguinius, which state that only diligence and compassion can make the galaxy a better place than it is today. Each of them strives to be a protector and consoler of the common people, inspiring them through their own deeds.

languages.text: Para muchos, estos sagrados guerreros son un ejemplo de virtud y deber, ya que los Ángeles Sangrientos defienden incansables los preceptos de su Primarca, Sanguinius, según los cuales solo la diligencia y la compasión harán de la galaxia un lugar mejor. Cada uno de ellos busca ser un protector y guardián de la gente corriente, inspirándolos mediante sus acciones.
languages.original_text: For many, these holy warriors are paragons of virtue and duty, for the Blood Angels unfailingly uphold the precepts of Primarch Sanguinius, which state that only diligence and compassion can make the galaxy a better place than it is today. Each of them strives to be a protector and consoler of the common people, inspiring them through their own deeds.

traits.locale_text: Para muchos, estos sagrados guerreros son un ejemplo de virtud y deber, ya que los Ángeles Sangrientos defienden incansables los preceptos de su Primarca, Sanguinius, según los cuales solo la diligencia y la compasión harán de la galaxia un lugar mejor. Cada uno de ellos busca ser un protector y guardián de la gente corriente, inspirándolos mediante sus acciones.

languages.text: 对许多人而言，这些神圣战士是美德与职责的典范，因为圣血天使始终恪守基因原体圣吉列斯的信条：唯有勤勉与悲悯，才能让银河系变得比今日更美好。他们每个人都努力成为平民的守护者与慰藉者，以自身行动激励世人。
languages.original_text: For many, these holy warriors are paragons of virtue and duty, for the Blood Angels unfailingly uphold the precepts of Primarch Sanguinius, which state that only diligence and compassion can make the galaxy a better place than it is today. Each of them strives to be a protector and consoler of the common people, inspiring them through their own deeds.

traits.locale_text: 对许多人而言，这些神圣战士是美德与职责的典范，因为圣血天使始终恪守基因原体圣吉列斯的信条：唯有勤勉与悲悯，才能让银河系变得比今日更美好。他们每个人都努力成为平民的守护者与慰藉者，以自身行动激励世人。

languages.text: Pour beaucoup, ces guerriers saints sont des parangons de vertu, car les Blood Angels ont toujours suivi sans faillir les préceptes du primarque Sanguinius, selon lesquels la compassion et la diligence sont les seules qualités capables d’améliorer la galaxie. Chacun d'entre eux s'efforce de protéger et de réconforter les gens du commun, et cherche à les inspirer à travers ses actions.
languages.original_text: For many, these holy warriors are paragons of virtue and duty, for the Blood Angels unfailingly uphold the precepts of Primarch Sanguinius, which state that only diligence and compassion can make the galaxy a better place than it is today. Each of them strives to be a protector and consoler of the common people, inspiring them through their own deeds.

traits.locale_text: Pour beaucoup, ces guerriers saints sont des parangons de vertu, car les Blood Angels ont toujours suivi sans faillir les préceptes du primarque Sanguinius, selon lesquels la compassion et la diligence sont les seules qualités capables d’améliorer la galaxie. Chacun d'entre eux s'efforce de protéger et de réconforter les gens du commun, et cherche à les inspirer à travers ses actions.

languages.text: Pek çokları için bu kutsal savaşçılar, erdem ve vazife timsalidir. Zira Kan Melekleri, Primark Sanguinius'un galaksiyi bugünkünden daha iyi bir yer hâline getirmenin yalnızca gayret ve şefkatle mümkün olduğunu belirten öğretilerine yürekten bağlıdır. Eylemleri ile sıradan insanlara ilham vererek onlar için birer koruyucu ve avutucu olma çabasındadırlar.
languages.original_text: For many, these holy warriors are paragons of virtue and duty, for the Blood Angels unfailingly uphold the precepts of Primarch Sanguinius, which state that only diligence and compassion can make the galaxy a better place than it is today. Each of them strives to be a protector and consoler of the common people, inspiring them through their own deeds.

traits.locale_text: Pek çokları için bu kutsal savaşçılar, erdem ve vazife timsalidir. Zira Kan Melekleri, Primark Sanguinius'un galaksiyi bugünkünden daha iyi bir yer hâline getirmenin yalnızca gayret ve şefkatle mümkün olduğunu belirten öğretilerine yürekten bağlıdır. Eylemleri ile sıradan insanlara ilham vererek onlar için birer koruyucu ve avutucu olma çabasındadırlar.

languages.text: 多くの者にとって、これらの聖なる戦士たちは、徳と義務の理想であり、彼らはプライマル・サンギニウスの教えを決して裏切らない。それは、勤勉さと慈悲だけが銀河を今日よりも良い場所にすることができるという教えである。彼らはそれぞれが、一般の人々を守る者であり慰めを与える者であり、彼らの行為を通して人々を鼓舞する。
languages.original_text: For many, these holy warriors are paragons of virtue and duty, for the Blood Angels unfailingly uphold the precepts of Primarch Sanguinius, which state that only diligence and compassion can make the galaxy a better place than it is today. Each of them strives to be a protector and consoler of the common people, inspiring them through their own deeds.

traits.locale_text: 多くの者にとって、これらの聖なる戦士たちは、徳と義務の理想であり、彼らはプライマル・サンギニウスの教えを決して裏切らない。それは、勤勉さと慈悲だけが銀河を今日よりも良い場所にすることができるという教えである。彼らはそれぞれが、一般の人々を守る者であり慰めを与える者であり、彼らの行為を通して人々を鼓舞する。

languages.text: Für viele sind diese heiligen Krieger der Inbegriff für Pflicht und Tugend, denn die Blood Angels wahren die Gebote des Primarch Sanguinius, die besagen, dass allein Eifer und Mitgefühl die Galaxis zu einem besseren Ort machen können. Jeder von ihnen strebt danach, ein Beschützer und Tröster des einfachen Volkes zu sein, indem er sie durch seine Taten inspiriert.
languages.original_text: For many, these holy warriors are paragons of virtue and duty, for the Blood Angels unfailingly uphold the precepts of Primarch Sanguinius, which state that only diligence and compassion can make the galaxy a better place than it is today. Each of them strives to be a protector and consoler of the common people, inspiring them through their own deeds.

traits.locale_text: Für viele sind diese heiligen Krieger der Inbegriff für Pflicht und Tugend, denn die Blood Angels wahren die Gebote des Primarch Sanguinius, die besagen, dass allein Eifer und Mitgefühl die Galaxis zu einem besseren Ort machen können. Jeder von ihnen strebt danach, ein Beschützer und Tröster des einfachen Volkes zu sein, indem er sie durch seine Taten inspiriert.
